results.rendered_html:
bhaviṣya a.
1 Future.
2 Imminent, impending;  Pt. 1. 91. 
— ṣyaṃ The future, futurity.
Comp.
— kālaḥ the future tense.
— jñānaṃ knowledge of futurity.
— purāṇaṃ N. of one of the 18 Purāṇas.
